recommendations.title: The Merry Gentlemen
recommendations.overview: To save her parents' small-town nightclub, a Broadway dancer stages an all-male, Christmas-themed revue — and meets a guy with all the right moves.

recommendations.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
recommendations.overview: When children start disappearing, a rebellious teen under house arrest starts to suspect that a legendary evil, a boogeyman known as the Cucuy, might be responsible.

recommendations.title: The Sandman
recommendations.overview: A monster from a little girl's nightmares comes to life and attacks anyone who would harm her.

recommendations.title: 12 Gifts of Christmas

recommendations.title: Fatal Affair

recommendations.title: My Oxford Year
recommendations.overview: An ambitious American fulfilling her dream of studying at Oxford falls for a charming Brit hiding a secret that may upend her perfectly planned life.

recommendations.title: The Scandalous Lady W

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.
